expectations.text: Plano identifica o scope como bundle (source + public refs + bundle), não no-bump nem source-only
Plano lista os arquivos canônicos de identity bump: package.json, bin/tes.js, README.md badge, docs/tds/DOCS-INDEX.yml, plugin/marketplace manifests, scripts VERSION constants
expectations.evidence: Section 8 has the full coordinated set.

expectations.text: Plano cita explicitamente o trap de bundle_sha256 hand-maintained em docs/i18n/tes-public.structure.yml
expectations.evidence: Section 9 + Section 10 cite the bundle_sha256 trap; baseline relied on SYNC-AUDIT-CHECKLIST.md.

expectations.text: Plano cita o trap de scoped sed em validate_reference_package.py (zip filename embarcado na versão)
expectations.evidence: No mention of the scoped sed / zip filename trap. Section 8 lists the validate_reference_package.py REQUIRED_PATHS update but does not warn about the global sed pitfall.

expectations.text: Plano inclui npm run commit:check antes do commit e tes_bump.py --governance-check como verificação final
Plano inclui phase de tag annotated + npm run release:check após push
Plano explicitamente não executa comandos de escrita (read-only conforme requisitado)
expectations.evidence: 'Status: PLAN ONLY (no writes will be executed).'
